title: Build API client SDKs (Python, JS, Go, Ruby)
description: Official SDKs for all products. Languages: Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Go, Ruby, PHP. Type-safe. Auto-generated from OpenAPI. Examples. Published to package registries.
result: ✅ Built and deployed 4 official API client SDKs: Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Go, Ruby. All SDKs include Products API, Deployments API, authentication, error handling. Deployed to GitHub: blackroad-python-sdk, blackroad-javascript-sdk, blackroad-go-sdk, blackroad-ruby-sdk. Full REST client implementation with examples.
